title: Add pod API to varlink
body:
Including all of the methods whose functionality is defined by podman pod * .
Also moved the location of getPodStatus to libpod/pod_api to allow it to be used in ListPods and GetPod
Also slightly changed the API specification.

comments.body: @jwhonce I changed the pod API a bit, mostly around error handling. All changes are included in just one commit (67 ...). PTAL (also @baude)
@mheon I also moved status to pod_api. I think it's the best way to avoid duplicate code, but also PTAL and let me know what you think.
Did an extra binary file sneak in? I see a .go.pod.swp

:pushpin: Commit 4e0ac14 has been approved by `mheon`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=mheon 4e0ac1487c32eb4492f9187da788202c44d09764 -->
